mapper.select: select t.id, 'TASK' as event_type, t.name as title, t.planned_start_date as start_time, t.planned_end_date as end_time, t.project_id, t.id as biz_id from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.is_deleted = 0 and (t.planned_start_date is not null or t.planned_end_date is not null) union all select m.id, 'MILESTONE' as event_type, m.name as title, m.planned_date as start_time, m.planned_date as end_time, m.project_id, m.id as biz_id from milestone m where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.is_deleted = 0 and m.planned_date is not null union all select m.id, 'MEETING' as event_type, m.title as title, m.scheduled_at as start_time, case when m.duration_minutes is not null then date_add(m.scheduled_at, interval m.duration_minutes minute) else m.scheduled_at end as end_time, m.project_id, m.id as biz_id from meeting_plan m where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.scheduled_at is not null union all select p.id, 'PROCUREMENT_DELIVERY' as event_type, concat('采购交付: ', p.item_name) as title, cast(concat(coalesce(p.actual_delivery_date, p.expected_delivery_date), ' 00:00:00') as datetime) as start_time, cast(concat(coalesce(p.actual_delivery_date, p.expected_delivery_date), ' 23:59:59') as datetime) as end_time, p.project_id, p.id as biz_id from procurement_item p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and p.is_deleted = 0 and coalesce(p.actual_delivery_date, p.expected_delivery_date) is not null order by start_time asc, id asc

select t.id, 'TASK' as event_type, t.name as title, t.planned_start_date as start_time, t.planned_end_date as end_time, t.project_id, t.id as biz_id from project_task t where t.assignee_id = #{userId} and t.is_deleted = 0 and (t.planned_start_date is not null or t.planned_end_date is not null) union all select m.id, 'MILESTONE' as event_type, m.name as title, m.planned_date as start_time, m.planned_date as end_time, m.project_id, m.id as biz_id from milestone m where m.owner_id = #{userId} and m.is_deleted = 0 and m.planned_date is not null union all select m.id, 'MEETING' as event_type, m.title as title, m.scheduled_at as start_time, case when m.duration_minutes is not null then date_add(m.scheduled_at, interval m.duration_minutes minute) else m.scheduled_at end as end_time, m.project_id, m.id as biz_id from meeting_plan m where m.host_id = #{userId} and m.scheduled_at is not null order by start_time asc, id asc

select case when exists(select 1 from acceptance_item ai where ai.project_id = #{projectId} and ai.is_deleted = 0) and not exists(select 1 from acceptance_item ai where ai.project_id = #{projectId} and ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.status <> 'COMPLETED') then true else false end as acceptance_completed, case when exists(select 1 from archive_item ar where ar.project_id = #{projectId} and ar.is_deleted = 0) and not exists(select 1 from archive_item ar where ar.project_id = #{projectId} and ar.is_deleted = 0 and ar.status <> 'ARCHIVED') then true else false end as archive_completed, (select count(1) from risk_register r where r.project_id = #{projectId} and r.is_deleted = 0 and r.status <> 'CLOSED') as open_risks, (select count(1) from change_request c where c.project_id = #{projectId} and c.is_deleted = 0 and c.status in ('SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')) as pending_changes, case when exists(select 1 from report_record rr where rr.project_id = #{projectId} and rr.is_deleted = 0 and rr.status = 'GENERATED') then true else false end as required_reports_ready
